beforeShellExecution.command: if command -v doc-builder >/dev/null 2>&1 && make -n quality >/dev/null 2>&1; then make quality || exit 2; else echo '{"permission":"allow","agent_message":"make quality skipped: no quality target or quality tooling (doc-builder) in this checkout — not a gate failure, but quality was NOT verified."}'; fi

if test -f utils/check_copies.py && PYTHONPATH=src python3 -c 'import diffusers' >/dev/null 2>&1; then PYTHONPATH=src python3 utils/check_copies.py || exit 2; else echo '{"permission":"allow","agent_message":"check_copies skipped: not a diffusers checkout or diffusers not importable here — # Copied from consistency was NOT verified. Run make fix-copies before opening a PR."}'; fi
